raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "lighter box (top box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The lighter box is resting on top of the darker box at the center of the table; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to approach from the left and right sides without colliding with the table edge or the darker box.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly above the darker box and no longer supported by it."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "clear tabletop area left of the darker box",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the lighter box and the left region of the table is free of obstacles and large enough (≥30×30 cm) to accommodate the box.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is placed flat on the table to the left of the darker box, leaving the darker box fully exposed and reachable from the front."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker box (bottom box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box is now unobstructed on the tabletop; both arms can approach its left and right faces without interference from the lighter box or table edges.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely grasped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table surface."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The lighter box is resting on top of the darker box at the center of the table; there is sufficient lateral clearance for both end-effectors to approach from the left and right sides without colliding with the table edge or the darker box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is securely held between the two end-effectors, lifted slightly above the darker box and no longer supported by it.

parsed_json.Target: clear tabletop area left of the darker box
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the lighter box and the left region of the table is free of obstacles and large enough (≥30×30 cm) to accommodate the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is placed flat on the table to the left of the darker box, leaving the darker box fully exposed and reachable from the front.

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box is now unobstructed on the tabletop; both arms can approach its left and right faces without interference from the lighter box or table edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely grasped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the table surface.
